name: Vertical Pack Expand
description: Every Monday it finds new businesses in the industry and area you target that look like a fit and need what you sell. Keeps a steady trickle of fresh prospects coming in instead of you starting from zero each week.
prompt_template: Find new businesses in the industry and location I target that fit the kind of customer I do best with. Focus on ones that look like they need what I offer. For each, pull the basics, a quick read on why they fit, and anything useful for a first conversation. Skip anyone already in my contacts or leads. Give me the new list to review.
